doppler_dimming_lib.spectra package

Submodules

doppler_dimming_lib.spectra.spectra module

doppler_dimming_lib.spectra.spectra.get_spectrum_from_txt(precision_level: int = 0) → ndarray

Returns the spectrum from txt file. Use the precision level to determine the sampling quality.

Parameters:

precision_level (int, optional) – : 0 to 2 increasing spectrum sampling, sparse (0, Thekaekara), medium (1, Thuillier) or dense (2, MODTRAN). Defaults to 0 for faster computations.

Returns:

spectrum wavelenghts in [cm] and irradiances in [erg / s cm2 sr A].

Return type:

np.ndarray

doppler_dimming_lib.spectra.spectra.set_spectrum_level(spectrum_level: int = 0) → c_void_p

Sets the spectrum to be used by this library.

Parameters:

spectrum_level (int, optional) – spectrum to load, from sparser (0) to denser (2), see get_spectrum_for_txt. Defaults to 0.

Returns:

pointer to spectra data, to be passed to c library

Return type:

ctypes.c_void_p
